title: Figure 1 in Gasterophilus intestinalis infestation in lion (Panthera leo) and plains zebra (Equus quagga) in the Serengeti ecosystem: Morphological and molecular profiling
author: Ndossi, Barakaeli Abdieli

description: Figure 1. The isolation of third larval stage Gasterophilus intestinalis from the African lion, showing the ventral and dorsal surface of the larvae.
